step_rationale: Collagen receptor; platelet adhesion to exposed fibrous cap; prothrombotic target; s5 anchor.
mechanism: GPVI binds exposed collagen upon cap rupture or erosion, triggering platelet adhesion, activation, and thrombus propagation.
